content:
Nothing is wrong with permissions.

---

## Why this happens in ChatGPT (plain)

ChatGPT has **different conversation modes** behind the scenes. Some chats allow:
- text only

Some allow:
- text + images / files

When you’re in a **text-only chat**, the app still shows the **+** menu, but **Camera / Photos / Files are disabled** (grayed out). That’s exactly what you’re seeing. You didn’t do anything wrong — it’s just how the app behaves.

---

## How to fix it (two easy ways)

### Option 1 — Start a new chat (fastest)
